description: User pivots within an active thread to an entirely different subject. The right move is to stop the old thread cleanly and create a new one (NOT steer — the subject changed).

openThreads.instruction: plan a weekend trip to Big Sur in May

script.text: actually scrap the trip stuff. find me a good electrician in Oakland.

responseRubric.judgePrompt: Did the agent close the prior trip-planning thread and start a NEW thread for the electrician search? Steering the old thread to electricians is wrong — the subject pivoted.
